name: 17q11_2_NF1_region
description: 17q11.2 NF1 microdeletion region, flanked by NF1-REPa, NF1-REPb, NF1-REPc SD clusters. Type-1 deletions (~1.4 Mb) span between NF1-REPa and NF1-REPc and remove ~14 genes including NF1; mediated by SUZ12-derived SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: NF1-REPa, -REPb, -REPc SD clusters of ~50-100 kb at >98% identity; type-1 deletions are NAHR between REPa and REPc; SUZ12/SUZ12P paralogs are the duplicon core.
